hooks.name: Block Image File Creation
hooks.description: Prevents creating image files via file creation tools.

action.command: powershell -Command "$input = [Console]::In.ReadToEnd(); $json = $input | ConvertFrom-Json; $path = ''; if ($json.toolInput.targetFile) { $path = $json.toolInput.targetFile } elseif ($json.toolInput.path) { $path = $json.toolInput.path }; if ($path -match '\.(png|jpg|jpeg|gif|webp|svg|ico|bmp|tiff|avif)$') { [Console]::Error.WriteLine('Blocked: Adding image files is not allowed in this project.'); exit 2 } else { exit 0 }"
